falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a trend reversal contrary to the bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate extreme volatility or momentum, contradicting the current 'UNKNOWN' phase assessment

falsification_conditions.condition: A key support level (e.g., $X) is broken by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A major support breakdown would confirm a continuation of the downtrend, falsifying the pattern similarity to the 2022 bottom

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
